personal.preferred_title: PySpark / SQL Data Engineer | Python, Airflow & Enterprise Analytics

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, PySpark, Spark, Airflow, ETL/ELT pipelines, production monitoring, analytics datasets, and stakeholder-facing reporting. Experienced designing scalable data workflows, optimizing SQL and data models, documenting technical designs, supporting production releases, and building reliable analytics systems for high-volume enterprise environments. Strong fit for remote roles requiring PySpark, Advanced SQL, Python, Airflow, monitoring, documentation, and client-facing delivery.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported Python/Pandas/PySpark data pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints, producing curated datasets for analytics, reporting, and forecasting.
Designed scalable data workflows across AWS Glue, S3, Athena, Redshift, Oracle, SQL, and PySpark to support high-volume transformation, querying, and reporting use cases.
Prepared model-ready analytics datasets for Prophet and scikit-learn forecasting workflows, supporting proactive capacity planning and bottleneck prediction.
Optimized SQL queries, Oracle schemas, historical retention models, and reporting datasets to improve performance, maintainability, and downstream analytics usability.
Implemented production monitoring and validation practices across data feeds, pipeline outputs, dashboards, and reporting layers to improve reliability and issue detection.
Partnered with technical leads, infrastructure teams, and business stakeholders to clarify requirements, explain data behavior, document design decisions, and deliver usable analytics solutions.
Created dashboards and reporting views using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly to surface operational and executive insights from large-scale telemetry data.
Documented transformation logic, service behavior, operational support steps, and technical specifications to improve maintainability and handoff quality.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Built analytics and reporting outputs from Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data for Brand.com and hospitality systems.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to identify optimization opportunities and present findings to engineering stakeholders.
Supported dashboard optimization, monitoring validation, and production troubleshooting for customer-facing digital systems.
Collaborated with technical and business teams to convert performance questions into measurable datasets, reports, and actionable recommendations.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Managed enterprise-scale telemetry environments with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting reporting, monitoring, and operational analytics.
Built Perl and Korn shell automation for data extraction and performance reporting, replacing manual exports with repeatable workflows.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, documentation, and reporting standards adopted across client environments.
Worked closely with J2EE/WebLogic, infrastructure, and operations teams to interpret telemetry data, troubleshoot issues, and support production decisions.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed enterprise telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits, SQL/JDBC bottlenecks, CPU, memory, thread, and garbage-collection constraints.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread-dump automation to improve runtime visibility during performance and regression testing.
Documented design findings, baseline metrics, and release-readiness thresholds used by engineering teams for production decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, preserving transaction performance and data integrity.
Optimized SQL and Oracle access patterns for high-volume workloads while reducing physical hardware footprint by 95%.
Built validation and regression testing utilities to verify correctness across millions of migrated transaction records.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and phased cutover support for a mission-critical enterprise migration.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported high-availability C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing interfaces and reporting processes for telecom-scale transaction systems.
Improved database performance by 10x through SQL, sequence, and process optimization while reducing memory usage by 75%.
Built automation scripts in Korn shell, Perl, Awk, Syncsort, and SQL to support operational data processing, reporting, and deployment workflows.
Supported QA cycles, production issue triage, release support, documentation, and cross-team troubleshooting.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Data Engineering: PySpark, Spark, ETL/ELT pipelines, Airflow pipelines, production analytics systems, data validation, data modeling, data warehousing
skills.Languages: Python, Advanced SQL, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, C++
skills.Cloud Data Platforms: AWS Glue, S3, Athena, Redshift, EC2, ECS; Azure/GCP concepts and transferable cloud data patterns
skills.Databases / Warehouses: Oracle, Oracle RAC, Redshift, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL performance tuning, schema design
skills.Analytics & Reporting: Operational analytics, executive reporting, Streamlit, matplotlib, plotly, Power BI / Looker concepts
skills.Monitoring & Reliability: Pipeline monitoring, logging, alerting, production troubleshooting, data reconciliation, runbooks
skills.Dev / Delivery: Unit-test awareness, code reviews, technical documentation, functional/technical specifications, CI/CD concepts
skills.Big Data: Hadoop/Hive, Parquet, distributed data processing, high-volume telemetry datasets
skills.Stakeholder Delivery: Business requirements analysis, TPM/technical lead collaboration, client-facing communication, developer guidance
skills.Adjacent / Learning: BigQuery concepts, Scala basics, Databricks, Delta Lake, Terraform, Kafka concepts

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a forecasting-oriented analytics workflow using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to process telemetry data, prepare model-ready datasets, and deliver capacity insights.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a scalable cloud data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, PySpark, and Parquet for ingestion, transformation, curated datasets, and analytics access.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python-based automation pipeline for semantic duplicate detection, LLM scoring, JSON artifact generation, quality checks, and application tracking using FAISS, sentence-transformers, and LLM APIs.
